subject: Aron, a small quadrupedal steel-type Pokemon with a heavy metal carapace and a round body, sitting in a grassy outdoor setting
description: A small, roughly spherical creature with a heavy silver-grey armored shell sits low to the ground on short legs. The carapace covers its back and top, with small visible eyes looking forward and stubby legs protruding beneath. The creature is seated in green grass with soft natural lighting. The background shows a green landscape with blurred foliage, suggesting an open meadow or forest edge on a bright day. The overall palette is light and natural, contrasting the creature's heavy metallic appearance with a soft environment.
foreground: small armored quadruped with heavy metal carapace sitting in grass
background: bright green grassy meadow with blurred foliage
emotion: calm and grounded; the small eyes have a quietly alert expression
